events.text: Goal!  Russia 1, Croatia 0. Denis Cheryshev (Russia) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Artem Dzyuba.
Dejan Lovren (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ivan Strinic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Russia 1, Croatia 1. Andrej Kramaric (Croatia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mario Mandzukic.
Goal!  Russia 1, Croatia 2. Domagoj Vida (Croatia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Luka Modric with a cross   following a corner.
Domagoj Vida (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for excessive celebration.
Yuri Gazinskiy (Russia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Josip Pivaric (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
Goal!  Russia 2, Croatia 2. Mário Fernandes (Russia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Alan Dzagoev with a cross   following a set piece situation.
